visual_description: The audio opens with a tense and dramatic orchestral score, creating a sense of urgency and suspense. A group of people are gathered in a dimly lit, chaotic scene. They are mostly silhouetted, with some figures holding umbrellas, suggesting it might be raining or they are in a dark, enclosed space. In the background, a bright, possibly broken, window or light source creates a stark contrast. The camera is shaky, capturing the movement and commotion of the crowd. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible. The camera pans slightly across the group, revealing more of the dark, indistinct figures. The music is characterized by low, pulsing strings and sharp, percussive hits that build a feeling of anticipation and action. The scene cuts to a close-up of a man in a dark suit and tie. He has a serious, contemplative expression and is looking down and to the side. Behind him, a wall is covered with a collage of black and white photographs, some of which appear to be portraits of men. The lighting is low-key, casting shadows on his face. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. The camera is steady, focusing on the man
